args.text: Game menu open. Look for Save & Exit at the top.

actions.rationale: The yellow hamburger icon at the bottom-left is the in-game menu opener; left-clicking it surfaces the save/exit options the user asked for.

notes: MOVE.dx/dy reference the 1024x494 source image. Tolerant grader hitbox: x in [25, 80], y in [415, 460]. The neighbouring info ('i') and undo ('arrow') icons must NOT be clicked — they are not the menu.
